landing.subtitle: Chat with resume-zen Ai in your own language. She quietly turns every answer into a recruiter-ready English resume that any ATS can read.
landing.freeToTry: Free to try · No credit card
landing.howItWorksHeading: Four quiet steps to a great resume.

features.conversationalBody: One question at a time. Answer naturally, the way you'd talk to a friend. No empty fields to stare at.
features.nativeInBody: Tell resume-zen Ai ‘maine ek game banayi’ — she writes ‘Designed an interactive game focused on user engagement.’
features.atsReadyBody: Three templates, each tested against real applicant tracking systems. Clean. Parsable. Quiet.

steps.step1Desc: 17 to choose from. We meet you where you are.
steps.step3Desc: resume-zen Ai tunes her questions to your industry.
steps.step4Desc: Watch your resume write itself, in real time.

auth.subtitleSignUp: It takes seconds — and your data stays yours.

templates.heading: Choose your template.
templates.subheading: Three layouts, each tested against real applicant tracking systems.

industry.heading: Which field are you applying for?
industry.subheading: resume-zen Ai will tailor her questions, skill suggestions and tone for this field.
industry.customPlaceholder: Type your field (e.g., Semiconductor QA, Government Exams, Hospitality)

dashboard.emptyBody: Pick a template, choose your field, and start chatting in your language. resume-zen Ai handles the English.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Delete this resume? This cannot be undone.

builder.intro: Hi. Let's build your resume. Tap the orb and answer in {{language}}.
builder.shortRepliesHint: Short replies, one question at a time.
builder.voiceErrMic: Couldn't start voice. Check microphone permission.
builder.emptyResumeState: Your resume will appear here, line by line, as you answer resume-zen Ai's questions.

errors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. You can try refreshing or head back home.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

authLeft.tagline: A quieter way to write a resume
authLeft.quote: “I just answered a few questions in Hindi. Five minutes later I had a beautiful resume in English.”

ats.name: ATS Professional
ats.description: Single column. Recruiter-ready. Parses cleanly through every applicant tracking system.

modern.name: Modern Minimal
modern.description: A quiet two-column layout with premium typography. Calm hierarchy, no decoration.

fresher.name: Fresher Smart
fresher.description: Project-first layout designed for students and early-career applicants.
